arts.ttl: Inter Milan vs AC Milan – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Inter Milan face AC Milan in the second leg of their Coppa Italia semi-final at the San Siro this evening. The Italian rivals collide in a huge cup clash, with the tie poised perfectly at 1-1 from the first encounter. arts.ttl: Milan Facing Risk of Racking Up Negative Records
arts.sum: Milan fell to Atalanta in the last matchday after two encouraging results since switching from 4-2-3-1 to 3-4-3. They have collected just 51 points after 33 games, which is their worst clip in 10 years. The Rossoneri had done worse only in 2014/2015.
